cmakefmt.executablePath.description: Path to the cmakefmt executable. When left at the default ('cmakefmt'), the extension first looks for a bundled binary shipped with this .vsix, then falls back to 'cmakefmt' on PATH. Set this to an absolute path only if you need to use a custom build.

cmakefmt.extraArgs.description: Extra arguments to pass to cmakefmt (e.g. ["--config", "/path/to/.cmakefmt.yaml"]).

cmakefmt.onSave.description: Deprecated. Use VS Code's built-in `editor.formatOnSave` (optionally scoped to `[cmake]`) instead. This setting is no longer read.
cmakefmt.onSave.deprecationMessage: Deprecated: this setting is no longer used. Enable format-on-save via `editor.formatOnSave`, optionally scoped to `[cmake]`.
